name: AstmStandard
description: JSON Structure for an ASTM consensus standard catalog record. Captures designation, ownership, document type, lifecycle, and access surfaces.

designation.description: ASTM designation in Letter+Number-Year form (e.g., C150-23, E8/E8M-22).

letterPrefix.description: Committee category letter A B C D E F G or J.

serialNumber.description: Numeric portion of the designation; may include metric companion.

title.description: Official title beginning with the document type.

documentType.description: TestMethod, Specification, Practice, Guide, Classification, or Terminology.

status.description: Active, Historical, Withdrawn, Superseded, or InDevelopment.
